content.text:
```mdl
@ Non‑Disclosure Agreement for the Exchange of Energy Management System Model Data
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_13_nda_8

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Types
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
type Party = {
    name: string
}

type ReceivingParty = {
    name: string,
    -- True when the Receiving Party is compelled by law, regulation or a
    -- judicial process to disclose Confidential Information.
    required_by_law: bool,
    -- True when the Receiving Party has already notified the Disclosing Party
    -- of that legal requirement.
    notified_disclosing_party: bool
}

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Entities (public model objects)
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
entity disclosing_party: Party
entity receiving_party: ReceivingParty

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Rules (deontic requirements)
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 6 – Defend Against Third Party Requests
rule O notify_disclosing_party_when_required:
    (receiving_party.required_by_law implies receiving_party.notified_disclosing_party) always
```
